violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
Thawed waffles, which stated keep frozen, were observed stored in the milk cooler. PIC discarded waffles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
A open container of carrots were observed stored at the 3 bay sink. PIC removed carrots. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: -hotel pans, -shelf under steam table. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The floors behind equipment and window ledges have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The hand washing sink in the toilet room used by food employees is lacking proper signage. Every hand washing sink used by food employees must have a sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
Box of individually packaged grahams were observed stored on the floor in the office. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in areas of the establishment. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
